rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland directly; US-Iran deal uncertainty continues to influence energy price outlook, but no new breakthrough.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal could ease global oil/gas prices, indirectly benefiting Polish energy costs, but Tehran's doubts mean no confirmed change yet.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: UK interdiction of a Russian shadow fleet vessel signals tightening enforcement of sanctions, relevant to Poland's interest in isolating Russia economically.

top_events.title: Israel accuses Hezbollah of ceasefire violation, issues displacement orders
top_events.summary: Middle East tensions escalating again, but no direct link to Poland's security or economy at this stage — distant indirect risk via energy markets.
